title: Apielex Official Website

title: Ancesstory
description: An upcoming native mobile application to explore, document, and visualize your family history and lineage.

title: mStore
description: A mobile-first Progressive Web App (PWA) designed to bring local shops online. Planned native upgrades for admin panels.

title: MediCraft
description: An upcoming native secure health locker to effortlessly manage medical histories, prescriptions, and lab reports.

title: LearnIt
description: An upcoming native platform empowering independent educators to host, manage, and deliver their online courses seamlessly.
